user.title: Configure FRA operating direction
user.description: Choose which operating direction usually causes aircraft noise at your location and how early you want to be warned.

data_description.noise_direction: Select the operating direction that usually produces aircraft noise where you live.
data_description.warning_minutes: Minutes before the start of a forecast noise window.

abort.already_configured: FRA operating direction is already configured.

init.title: FRA operating direction options
init.description: Change which operating direction usually causes aircraft noise at your location and how early you want to be warned.

data_description.noise_direction: Select the operating direction that usually produces aircraft noise where you live.
data_description.warning_minutes: Minutes before the start of a forecast noise window.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Refreshes the FRA operating direction immediately and optionally returns a summary for automations.
